text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 20 

CLM_CHRT_RVW_SW 

LABEL: Claim Chart Review Switch 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is used to indicate whether the encounter record is a chart review record. Chart reviews 
are a type of encounter data record that allow Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) to add or 
remove diagnoses that they identified through medical record reviews that were not initially reported 
on encounter
